items.title: CVE-2026-58814: Fortinet FortiOS Authentication Bypass Exploited in the Wild
items.analysis: Rapid7 researchers observed active exploitation of CVE-2026-58814, an authentication bypass in Fortinet FortiOS with a CVSS score of 9.6, affecting versions prior to 7.4.9. Attackers are chaining the bypass with a post-auth command injection to gain root on internet-facing FortiGate firewalls. Rapid7 has published indicators of compromise and a technical analysis.

impact.how_to_check: Identify all internet-facing Fortinet FortiOS devices. Check firmware versions against the advisory, and review access logs for unauthorized access, unusual processes, or configuration changes.

items.tanium_hint: Fortinet FortiOS is typically a network appliance, not a Tanium-managed endpoint. If it isn't under Tanium, pivot to the Open Ports sensor on adjacent managed hosts to spot exposed management interfaces, and use your network/asset inventory to confirm firmware versions.
items.rapid7_hint: In InsightVM, filter the vulnerability view by CVE-2026-58814. If the check only returns a version/potential match, run a credentialed scan to confirm real exposure. Build a dynamic asset group on installed "Fortinet FortiOS" to track remediation.

items.title: CISA Releases Advisory on Actively Exploited Ivanti Connect Secure Vulnerability
items.analysis: CISA released an advisory detailing active exploitation of a critical vulnerability in Ivanti Connect Secure VPN appliances tracked as CVE-2026-59021. Organizations are urged to apply patches immediately.

impact.affected_versions: Ivanti Connect Secure (specific versions not provided, assume all vulnerable until vendor clarifies)
impact.how_to_check: Identify all internet-facing Ivanti Connect Secure devices. Check firmware versions against the advisory, and review access logs for unauthorized access, unusual processes, or configuration changes.

items.tanium_hint: Ivanti Connect Secure is typically a network appliance, not a Tanium-managed endpoint. If it isn't under Tanium, pivot to the Open Ports sensor on adjacent managed hosts to spot exposed management interfaces, and use your network/asset inventory to confirm firmware versions.

items.title: Progress Kemp LoadMaster Pre-Auth RCE Flaw Faces Active Exploitation Attempts
items.analysis: A pre-authentication Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability in Progress Kemp LoadMaster is currently facing active exploitation attempts. This critical flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-51101 with a CVSS score of 9.8, allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected devices. Progress has released fixes and administrators are urged to patch immediately.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.

items.tanium_hint: No single product is named. Use Installed Applications to inventory the software class in the report, then the Open Ports sensor to surface exposed services worth prioritizing.
items.rapid7_hint: In InsightVM, filter the vulnerability view by CVE-2026-51101. If the check only returns a version/potential match, run a credentialed scan to confirm real exposure. Build a dynamic asset group on the affected software to track remediation.

items.title: Over 900 Oracle E-Business instances exposed to ongoing attacks
items.analysis: More than 900 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) instances are publicly exposed and subject to ongoing attacks. These attacks are leveraging a critical security flaw tracked as CVE-2026-53000, potentially leading to unauthorized access and data compromise. Oracle has issued an emergency patch through its Critical Patch Update program.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.

items.title: Aflac Japan discloses breach affecting 4.38 million individuals
items.analysis: Aflac Japan has reported a data breach affecting 4.38 million individuals, the insurer disclosed this week. The extent of the stolen data is still being assessed.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.

items.title: Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware
items.analysis: Hackers are actively exploiting CVE-2026-48558, a critical vulnerability in SimpleHelp with a CVSS score of 9.8, to deploy Djinn Stealer. Active exploitation means immediate remediation is required.

impact.affected_versions: Microsoft Windows (specific versions not provided, assume all vulnerable until vendor clarifies)
impact.how_to_check: Inventory all Microsoft Windows installations and compare versions against the advisory. Review logs on matching hosts for unusual authentication or administrative actions.

items.tanium_hint: Use Installed Application Version["Microsoft Windows"] to find affected builds (or Installed Applications containing "Microsoft Windows" for a broader sweep). Question shape: Get Installed Application Version["Microsoft Windows"] from all machines.
items.rapid7_hint: In InsightVM, filter the vulnerability view by CVE-2026-48558. If the check only returns a version/potential match, run a credentialed scan to confirm real exposure. Build a dynamic asset group on installed "Microsoft Windows" to track remediation.

items.title: Public PoC Released for Critical libssh2 CVE-2026-55200 Client-Side SSH Flaw
items.analysis: A public Proof-of-Concept (PoC) has been released for CVE-2026-55200, a critical client-side SSH vulnerability in libssh2 with a CVSS score of 9.8. Versions prior to 1.11.2 are affected. This flaw could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code when connecting to a malicious SSH server.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.

items.title: Ousaban Banking Trojan Targets Iberian Bank Users with Fake PDF Lures
items.analysis: The Ousaban banking trojan is actively targeting bank users in the Iberian Peninsula. The campaign has affected thousands of users across Spain and Portugal since May.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.
